name: UGC / 买家秀
description: 模仿真实用户拍摄的买家秀、开箱图，有真实感

defaults.background: real casual home environment, slightly lived-in
defaults.lighting: natural indoor light, slightly imperfect, warm

prompt_template.subject: real person using {product_description} at home, UGC style
prompt_template.quality: shot on iPhone, natural and candid, not retouched

overrides.composition: hands unboxing product, mid-action, smartphone perspective

overrides.background: bedroom or living room, personal space
overrides.composition: selfie angle holding product, mirror selfie style

overrides.background: desk setup, product next to phone/laptop
overrides.composition: top-down desk shot, multiple items visible, honest feel
